creator: wenheping@gmail.com
text:
fix the build error when build with WITHOUT_X11.

The patch is from:
http://lists.open-bio.org/pipermail/emboss/2009-March/003538.html

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: #cd /usr/ports/biology/emboss
#make install WITHOUT_X11=yes

then you will meet the build error
